summary: Iteration 24: Testing Checklist File Upload Feature. Backend: 26/26 tests PASSED (100%). All upload, list, delete, serve endpoints working. Invalid extension rejection (.exe, .txt, .zip) working. Student ownership validation working (student2 cannot upload to student1's procedure). Frontend: Phase 1 checklist shows all 11 items with upload hints (PPT, PDF / PDF / PDF, Images) for uploadable items.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend checklist file upload correctly validates file extensions (lines 1124-1127)
Backend correctly validates student ownership before allowing upload/delete (lines 1121-1122, 1188-1189)
Backend file serve endpoint /api/checklist-files/{filename} works without auth (line 1203)
Frontend ChecklistForm correctly shows upload hints for items with hasUpload:true
Frontend shows 'Upload PPT, PDF' or 'Upload PDF' hints below uploadable items
Phase 1 checklist has 11 items including CBCT (id: cbct) and RealGuide (id: realguide)
Uploadable items: academic_readiness, hematological, radiographic, cbct, realguide

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 11 Phase 1 items found, upload hints displayed correctly

seed_data_creation: Created student2 user (shruti.mehta@student.dental.edu) for ownership validation tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Procedure 699fbfa15279dfa7819789b8 has 3 test files uploaded (hematological, academic_readiness, radiographic). Student2 (shruti.mehta@student.dental.edu) was created for testing ownership validation. All 9 allowed file extensions (.pdf, .ppt, .pptx, .doc, .docx, .jpg, .jpeg, .png, .heic) tested and working. Invalid extensions (.exe, .txt, .zip) correctly rejected with 400 status.
